title: Trad/Swing Party @ The Spice of Life
titleEn: Trad/Swing Party @ The Spice of Life
titleBg: Трад/Суинг парти в The Spice of Life
description: An unusual show presenting music from the 20s and 30s with Coco 'n' the Fellas and the Swing'it Dixie Band in Soho.
descriptionEn: An unusual show presenting music from the 20s and 30s with Coco 'n' the Fellas and the Swing'it Dixie Band in Soho.
descriptionBg: Необичайно шоу с музика от 20-те и 30-те години с Coco 'n' the Fellas и Swing'it Dixie Band в Сохо.
body:
Come and join us for a Trad/Swing PARTY with Coco ‘n’ the Fellas and the Swing'it Dixie Band. 

The Spice of Life is hosting an unusual show presenting music from the 20s and 30s! New Orleans, French Gypsy Swing and a little bit of jazz-fusion to insure an amazing night!!! Put on your Best Vintage looks and come to the party! We hope to pack the place with dancing divas!

There will be sparkling golden beads, a squeaky clarinet, dancing musicians in hats and heels…even a banjo will appear!!!  Who could resist such a crazy night???

Doors open at 6pm, Music at 8pm
Tickets: £10 on the door (£8.80 in Adv) 

http://www.wegottickets.com/event/402853


About the bands:

Coco ‘n’ the Fellas:

About to head off to their first European Summer Tour, the band start the journey in Soho! They will be touring England, Scotland, Italy, Switzerland and even Bulgaria this hot season. Playing at renown venues such as Torino Jazz Club, Studio 5 Jazz Club, Be-bop café as well as featuring at radio stations and tv shown within Europe. 

Coco ‘n’ the Fellas originally started as a Gypsy tribute quartet but soon found love in composing and arranging in their own style. Stretching the boundaries of the Swing traditions Coco will transport you to a sonic landscape of gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more...

Swing it:

Norways hottest Dixieband, Swing'it, is coming to Spice of Life to join Coco 'n' the Fellas for a night of Trad and Swing. 
They're taking their audience on a journey 100 years back in time and across the Atlantic to 1920s New Orleans, promising a swinging evening filled with great music, sweet harmonies, an out-of-tune-banjo, three buckets of charm, boater hats and braces, mesmerizing singers and a vibrant atmosphere you' won't find anywhere else in town! 

These guys play all over Norway and have lately brought their music to the streets of London where they play at hidden speakeasies, cocktail bars and some of the city's finest jazz clubs.
bodyEn:
Join us for a Trad/Swing PARTY with Coco ‘n’ the Fellas and the Swing'it Dixie Band. The Spice of Life hosts an unusual show presenting music from the 20s and 30s! New Orleans, French Gypsy Swing, and a little bit of jazz-fusion to ensure an amazing night.

Put on your best vintage looks and come to the party! Expect sparkling golden beads, a squeaky clarinet, and dancing musicians in hats and heels. Who could resist such a crazy night?

About the bands:
Coco ‘n’ the Fellas: A London-based quartet blending gypsy swing with bebop and fusion, about to embark on their first European summer tour.
Swing'it: Norway's hottest Dixie band, bringing the 1920s New Orleans spirit to London with charm, harmonies, and a vibrant atmosphere.
bodyBg:
Присъединете се към нас за Трад/Суинг ПАРТИ с Coco ‘n’ the Fellas и Swing'it Dixie Band. The Spice of Life е домакин на необичайно шоу с музика от 20-те и 30-те години! Ню Орлиънс, френски джипси суинг и малко джаз-фюжън гарантират невероятна вечер.

Облечете най-добрите си винтидж дрехи и елате на партито! Очакват ви златни мъниста, кларинет и танцуващи музиканти. Кой би могъл да устои на такава луда вечер?

За групите:
Coco ‘n’ the Fellas: Базиран в Лондон квартет, съчетаващ джипси суинг с бибоп и фюжън, непосредствено преди първото си европейско лятно турне.
Swing'it: Най-популярната диксиленд група в Норвегия, пренасяща духа на Ню Орлиънс от 20-те години в Лондон с много чар и страхотна атмосфера.
